summary: End-to-end testing of PortfolioRoast.ai (backend + frontend). All 12 backend pytest cases passed (100%), covering eligibility, Razorpay order creation, signature verification rejection, validation, free roast AI generation, 402 on second roast, get-by-id, 404, and URL scrape fallback. Full frontend flow verified: landing page renders with all sections (hero, terminal form, how-it-works, sample burn, pricing FREE+₹29, FAQ accordion, footer). Free roast end-to-end works: new email + notes -> loading terminal -> navigates to /roast/:id -> meme card shows score/10, 5 red callouts, 5 green fixes, one-liner verdict, Twitter share, roast-again buttons. Second submission with same email triggers /api/payment/create-order and opens the real Razorpay checkout popup (2 iframes loaded with UPI/Cards/Netbanking/Wallet/EMI options). Interactive payment completion cannot be automated (requires real OTP/card) and was intentionally skipped.
critical_code_review_comments: Footer text 'Built with scars in Jaipur' is CSS-uppercased via innerText, fine but noted.
Razorpay SDK prints noisy ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED/permissions-policy warnings in console (lumberjack analytics endpoints). These are harmless and originate from Razorpay, not app code.

generate_roast payment-gating path: payment is only consumed AFTER AI call succeeds. If AI fails with 502, the user's payment remains unconsumed and reusable - acceptable behavior but worth noting so a retry pattern is documented.
No rate limiting on /api/roast/generate - a single email can trigger the expensive Gemini call before eligibility is rejected (free path only runs AI once, so not a real issue).
_scrape_url is synchronous (requests.get) inside an async endpoint - will block the event loop for up to 12s per scrape. Consider httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_executor.
server.py is 412 lines - within the 700-line soft limit but splitting into routers/services/ai would improve maintainability as it grows.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable flows (paid interactive payment not automatable)

test_credentials: No login required. Test emails generated dynamically as TEST_<tag>_<uuid>@test.com and autotest_<ts>@test.com. Razorpay test keys already in backend/.env.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests use unique emails per run so no cleanup needed. MongoDB now contains ~10 test emails/roasts/1-2 payments after this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_roast.py is a reusable regression suite. Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_roast.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Full free-roast AI generation takes ~30-60s (Gemini 2.5 Pro) so use 120s timeout. The paid path (POST /api/roast/generate with payment_id) CANNOT be tested without completing a real Razorpay payment (OTP required); verify by clicking through the opened popup manually if needed.
